zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry Barker於1374年出生在英國史洛普爾卡爾福哈爾時，他的父親William Barker II27歲，母親Margery Whorwood22歲。他與Margery Lovestick結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1438年在英國英格蘭史洛普爾卡爾福哈爾享年64歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry Barker于1374年出生在英国史洛普爾卡爾福哈爾时，他的父亲William Barker II27岁，母亲Margery Whorwood22岁。他与Margery Lovestick结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1438年在英国英格兰史洛普爾卡爾福哈爾享年64岁。

nameMeanings.name: Barker
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a tanner of leather, from Middle English barkere ‘tanner’, tree bark having been used as the tanning agent.

English: occupational name for a shepherd, from Middle English berker, bercher (Old French berchier, bercher, berkier, berker, Late Latin berbicarius, from berbex ‘ram’, genitive berbicis). With the change of -ar- to -er- in Middle English, this became indistinguishable from the preceding name (see 1 above).
Americanized form of German   Berger   or   Barger  .

variants.name: Berger
meanings: German, Dutch, Swedish, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): topographic name for someone who lived in the mountains or hills (see   Berg  ). The surname of German origin is also found in many other European countries, e.g. in France (Alsace and Lorraine), Russia, Poland, Czechia, Hungary, and Croatia, and Slovenia, often as a translation into German of corresponding Slavic topographic names or surnames. As a Jewish name it is mainly artificial. Compare   Bargar  ,   Barger  ,   Barker  ,   Barrier  , and   Barriger  .
French: occupational name from Old French bergier ‘shepherd’ (from Late Latin berbicarius, from berbex ‘ram’). It is also found in England, as a surname of Huguenot origin. Compare Shepard .
Norwegian: habitational name from any of various farms so named with the plural of   Berg   ‘mountain’.

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry Barker was born in 1374, in Calverhall, Shropshire, England, his father, William Barker II, was 27 and his mother, Margery Whorwood, was 22. He married Margery Lovestick. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died in 1438, in Calverhall, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 64.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry Barker est né en 1374, à Calverhall, Shropshire, Angleterre, son père, William Barker II, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Margery Whorwood, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Margery Lovestick. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé en 1438, à Calverhall, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 64 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henry Barker 1374 in Calverhall, Shropshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Barker II 27 und seine Mutter Margery Whorwood 22. Er hat Margery Lovestick geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb 1438 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Calverhall, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Barker è nato il nel 1374 nel Calverhall, Shropshire, England, il suo padre, William Barker II, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Margery Whorwood, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Margery Lovestick. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì nel 1438, nel Calverhall, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 64 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry Barkerが1374年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアカルバーハルで生まれた時，父William Barker IIは27歳，母Margery Whorwoodは22歳であった。Margery Lovestickと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1438年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアカルバーハルで64歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry Barker(이)가 1374년 영국 슈럽실르 캘버홀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Barker II(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Margery Whorwood(은)는 22세였다. 그는 Margery Lovestick(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1438년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 캘버홀에서 64세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Barker nasceu em 1374, em Calverhall, Shropshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Barker II, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Margery Whorwood, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Margery Lovestick. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1438, em Calverhall, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 64 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry Barker родился в 1374 г. в местности калвиролл, шропшир, Англия, его отцу по имени William Barker II было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Margery Whorwood, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Margery Lovestick. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер в 1438 г. в местности калвиролл, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 64 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henry Barker nació en 1374, en Calverhall, Shropshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Barker II, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Margery Whorwood, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Margery Lovestick. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió en 1438, en Calverhall, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 64 años.
